title: rubus × novanglicus
intro: Rubus × novanglicus, also known as the English thorn or English blackberry, is a hybrid of the blackberry and raspberry plants, characterized by its thorny canes and edible fruit. The leaves and roots of Rubus × novanglicus have been used in traditional medicine, possessing antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties that can help to soothe digestive issues and reduce swelling. The plant's medicinal properties also offer potential health benefits, including reducing blood sugar levels, alleviating menstrual cramps, and supporting cardiovascular health. Rubus × novanglicus can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, teas, and tinctures, which can be consumed fresh or dried to harness its medicinal properties.
